RESEND_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for sending emails

APP_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the application (e.g., https://happierblock.com)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for AI functionality

CLERK_JWT_ISSUER_DOMAIN.description: Clerk Frontend API URL (issuer) for Convex auth, e.g. https://your-app.clerk.accounts.dev

DEMO_SEED_SECRET.description: Secret for api.demoSeed.seedDemoHappierBlock (min 6 chars; use a long random value on shared deployments). Used by npm run seed:demo.
